title: minthe pulegia
intro: Minthe pulegia, also known as American pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant contains pulegone, a volatile oil with medicinal properties, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of minthe pulegia include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, ease digestive issues, and act as a natural insect repellent. The herbal preparations of minthe pulegia include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
